title: Enrollment Schedule for School Year 2026–2027
content: Enrollment for incoming Grade 7 and Senior High School students will officially begin on July 25, 2026. Please prepare all required documents before visiting the registrar's office.

title: Brigada Eskwela 2026
content: Parents, alumni, and volunteers are invited to participate in Brigada Eskwela activities to help prepare classrooms and school facilities for the upcoming school year.

title: Scholarship Applications Now Open
content: MSPC is now accepting scholarship applications for qualified students under academic excellence and technical skills programs.

title: Campus Maintenance Advisory
content: Selected workshops and laboratories will temporarily close for maintenance and upgrades from July 12 to July 14.

title: Faculty Meeting Reminder
content: All faculty members are requested to attend the general assembly meeting on Friday at 1:00 PM in the main conference hall.
